case_title: NOAH LEE MARGETTS VS. MXB BATTERY OPERATION, LP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MXB BATTERY OPERATION, LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF NOAH LEE MARGETTS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MXB BATTERY OPERATIONS LP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PABLO ZAVALA. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN LINKED OTHER RELATED CASES:18-859253, 18-859254, 18-859255, 18-859257, WITH PRESENT DEFENDANT JULIE WHIM AGENCY REPRESENTED BY JULIE JOHNSON OWNER.PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED UNDER THIS CASE NUMBER FOR ALL 4 CASES. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.99 FILED BY MARGETTS, NOAH LEE AS TO DEFENDANT MXB BATTERY OPERATION, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARGETTS, NOAH LEE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARGETTS, NOAH LEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MXB BATTERY OPERATION, LP THIS CLAIM ARISES OUT OF THE SAME ALLEGATIONS PLAINTIFF BROUGHT IN CSM-18-858515 AND IS BARRED BY RES JUDICATA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105): YOU MUST GO TO COURT TO BE HEARD. THE PRIOR JUDGMENT BARS ANY NEW ACTION ON THE SAME FACTS, BUT THE OCTOBER 19 COMPLAINT DOES NOT SPECIFY THE DATES PLAINTIFF ALLEGES HE WORKED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT MXB BATTERY OPERATION, LP
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT MXB BATTERY OPERATION, LP
